title: ESSX Rank Manager
description: ESSX Rank Manager is a rank mod who adds ranks with permission color codes and prefixes.
body:
# ESSX Rank Manager
is a server side mod to create ranks with permissions and has a bunch of usefull commands and a colorful customizable chat design


### **Rank commands**
- /rank create <name> <color> <prefix> - Creates a new rank.
![rank create example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27dc4e05737b8c71dfb977d142dabf1c8e00df4a.png)

and will on default settings look like this:
![Owner rank we just created](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/936d6549989c2d3a562483506ab486da72532783.png)

Default Member rank given to player when they join for the first time
![Default Member rank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a9fed9f59638ce9392146495afa951dff845906.png)


- /rank delete <name> - Deletes a rank
- /rank per add <rank> <perm> - Adds a permission to a rank
- /rank per del <rank> <perm> - Removes a permission from a rank
- /rank give <player> <rank> - Assigns a rank to a player
- /rank remove <player> <rank> - Removes a rank from a player
- /rank list - Lists all available ranks
- /rank list players - Lists all players and their ranks


### **Group Commands**
![group in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6feb7368220c1b9fe49dfef0e1912a53978c432d.png)
- /group create <group name> <color> <prefix> - creates a new group
- /group delete <group name> - deletes a group
- /group give <player> - give player a group
- /group remove <player> - removes the group from a player
- /group list - Lists all available groups
- /group list players - lists all players and ther group


other commands:

### **Help**
- /essx help <page>
- /essx version

### **Spawn**
- /spawn
- /spawn set

### **Teleport requests**
- /tpa <target-player>
- /tpahere <target-player>
- /tpaccept <target-player>
- /tpdeny <target-player>

### **Player Homes**
- /home set <home-name>
- /home tp <home-name>
- /home delete <home-name>
- /home list

### **Weather**
- /day
- /night
- /sun
- /rain
- /storm



# BUGS AND FUTURE ADDS:
1. added groups
2. added missing commands
3. added Tab Playerlist visuals so you can see the groups and ranks of a player
4. added a config file to disable/enable essx commands (like /tpa or /home) so you can use it just for the ranks and groups
